name: Post-event Pain - Comprehensive Query (Pediatric Scoliosis + Pain Score)
description: Tests ability to find pediatric scoliosis-surgery patients with post-operative pain assessment. Per PheKB algorithm, the cohort requires age ≥6 + scoliosis dx + surgery + ≥3 NRS pain scores per encounter.
prompt: Find pediatric scoliosis patients with post-operative pain severity scores.

prompts.broad: Find pediatric scoliosis surgery patients with documented post-operative pain severity scores (NRS 0-10) — used in pain pharmacogenetics studies.
prompts.expert: Run two queries. (1) Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|M41.9 — scoliosis. (2) Observation?code=http://loinc.org|38208-5&value-quantity=ge4 — pain score >=4. Union the patient IDs.
